list.title: Restaurants worth planning the day around.
list.description: Explore polished dining rooms, memorable Moroccan tables, and city-specific picks for food-led travel across Morocco.
list.emptyDescription: Try a different city or a broader search term{{queryPart}}{{cityPart}}.

detail.noReviewsDescription: Be the first traveler to share your experience at {{restaurantName}}.
detail.experienceTitle: A symphony of texture, taste, and tradition.
detail.paragraphOne: Nestled in the vibrant heart of {{city}}, {{name}} offers a dining experience that bridges generations of culinary heritage and modern gastronomy. Every dish is a testament to the rich, sun-drenched landscapes and bustling souks of Morocco.
detail.paragraphTwo: From the moment you step inside, the atmosphere envelops you with warm ochre tones, the subtle scent of toasted cumin and orange blossom, and the gentle hum of intimate conversations. The menu is thoughtfully curated, focusing on seasonal ingredients sourced from local artisans.
detail.paragraphThree: Whether you are seeking a slow-paced evening of fine dining or a spirited gathering, {{name}} promises an unforgettable journey through taste and texture, perfectly capturing the heartbeat of {{city}}.
detail.shareReviewDescription: Share your experience at {{restaurantName}} with other travelers.
detail.essentialsDescription: Everything you need to plan your visit to {{restaurantName}}.

form.placeholder: Tell us about the ambiance, service, and of course, the food...
form.commentError: Review comment must be at least 3 characters
